name: Spaghetti Gorgonzola
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Gorgonzola or blue cheese - crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbled cheese with whipping cream in a saucepan.
2. Cook over low heat just until the cheese melts, stirring constantly.
3. Combine the spaghetti with the hot cheese mixture.
4. Season to taste with salt and freshly ground pepper.
